mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report (reporterID, accusedActivityID, reportReason, reportTime, reportProcessStatus) VALUES (#{reporterID}, #{accusedActivityID}, #{reportReason}, #{reportTime}, #{reportProcessStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET reportProcessStatus = #{reportProcessStatus} WHERE reportID = #{reportID}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM report WHERE reporterID = #{reporterID} ORDER BY reportTime DESC, reportID DESC

SELECT * FROM report WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( CAST(reportID AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(reporterID AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(accusedActivityID AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR reportReason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND reportProcessStatus = #{reportProcessStatus}
ORDER BY reportTime DESC, reportID DESC
